text.title: Modal Portal and WAI-ARIA Dialog Pattern
text.summary: Modal via createPortal must implement the full WAI-ARIA dialog pattern: role="dialog", aria-modal, aria-labelledby, focus trap, scroll lock, ESC handler, and SSR mount guard.

rule.statement: Every modal must set role="dialog", aria-modal="true", aria-labelledby pointing to the heading id, and optionally aria-describedby for the description.
rule.rationale: Screen readers announce the dialog and its label on focus; missing attributes cause the dialog to be announced as a generic region with no context.

example.code:
{title}

{description &&

{description}

}

rule.statement: Gate createPortal behind a useEffect mount check. Never call createPortal during SSR — document.body does not exist on the server.
rule.rationale: createPortal to document.body throws "document is not defined" during SSR/SSG without a mount guard.

rule.statement: Lock document.body scroll when the modal opens via useEffect. Remove the lock and keyboard listener in the cleanup function.
rule.rationale: Without scroll lock, the page behind the overlay scrolls on touch devices. Without cleanup, the listener accumulates on repeated open/close cycles.
